task_completion.description: The MRHead.nrrd volume is loaded and visible in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface is open and shows the brain MRI in the axial, sagittal, and/or coronal slice views.

task_completion.description: Two distinct fiducial markers are placed on the MRI volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two markup points (typically colored dots or crosshairs) are visible at different locations in the 2D slice views or the 3D view.

task_completion.description: The fiducials are correctly named 'Landmark_A' and 'Landmark_B'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Markups module table in the left panel or the text labels next to the fiducials in the viewer explicitly show the names 'Landmark_A' and 'Landmark_B'.

task_completion.description: The scene is configured to be saved as an MRB (Medical Reality Bundle) file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save Data' dialog in 3D Slicer is open, and the file format for the scene is set to Medical Reality Bundle (.mrb).

task_completion.description: The MRB file is successfully saved to the correct export directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or Slicer save confirmation shows the file 'annotated_brain_scene.mrb' located in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/Exports/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to load the volume and place fiducials.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 3D Slicer application open and being interacted with (e.g., clicking modules, placing points), rather than just running a headless Python script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file through the application rather than creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save process (Save Data dialog in Slicer) is visible in the trajectory, linking the active application state to the final output file.

integrity.description: The fiducials are placed at genuinely distinct 3D locations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The fiducials are visually separated in the slice views/3D view, or their coordinates in the Markups table are clearly different, ensuring they are not stacked on the exact same coordinate.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The resulting MRB file should have a minimum size of 1,000,000 bytes (~1 MB). If the file manager or terminal shows file sizes, verify that annotated_brain_scene.mrb is at least this large, which confirms the volume data was successfully bundled into the scene.
